scripts.run: php artisan migrate && php artisan config:cache && php artisan route:cache && php artisan optimize:clear && php artisan config:cache && php artisan route:cache && php artisan view:clear && php artisan cache:clear && php artisan serve --port=4004
scripts.precache: php artisan optimize:clear && php artisan package:discover
scripts.gateway: npm run precache && concurrently -k -n gateway,users,clubs,leagues,matches,venues,lineup,invitation,merchandise -c blue,green,yellow,magenta,cyan,white,black,red,gray "cross-env GATEWAY_ENABLED=true php artisan serve --port=8000" "cross-env GATEWAY_ENABLED=false php artisan serve --port=8001" "cross-env GATEWAY_ENABLED=false php artisan serve --port=8002" "cross-env GATEWAY_ENABLED=false php artisan serve --port=8003" "cross-env GATEWAY_ENABLED=false php artisan serve --port=8004" "cross-env GATEWAY_ENABLED=false php artisan serve --port=8005" "cross-env GATEWAY_ENABLED=false php artisan serve --port=8006" "cross-env GATEWAY_ENABLED=false php artisan serve --port=8007" "cross-env GATEWAY_ENABLED=false php artisan serve --port=8008"
